summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix actions are planned; open useful PRs are kept independent, and the one hydrated security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with maintainer review/rebase context; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Standalone linked-fix PR should remain open for maintainer review; no inventory close action is justified.
Useful PR tied to an open Telegram context-loss issue; proof/review status makes it non-mutating inventory keep.
Maintainer-owned work in progress should stay independent; automated closure or merge planning would overstep the inventory job.
Route only this PR to central OpenClaw security handling; do not close, merge, comment, label, or fix through Clownfish.
Keep the contributor PR open as independent inventory work; it is not safe to close or merge from this shard.

Useful linked PR with unresolved review-bot comments; keep open and independent rather than closing or merging.

Potentially useful but product-sensitive heartbeat behavior change; keep independent rather than closing or merging from inventory.
